summary: Field Agent Authentication Bug Fix - ALL TESTS PASSED (100%). The fix successfully addresses: 1) field_agent added to registration form, 2) ObjectId serialization in login/me responses, 3) Login redirect for field_agent goes to /agent/terrain. Both backend API tests (7/7) and frontend UI tests (4/4) passed.
critical_code_review_comments: auth.py: Lines 264-267 correctly serialize ObjectId fields in login response using for loop
auth.py: Lines 280-283 correctly serialize ObjectId fields in /me endpoint
auth.py: Lines 110-113 initialize field_agent with zone and roles=['field_agent'] at registration
Register.jsx: Line 18 correctly added field_agent to userTypes array with label 'Agent Terrain'
Login.jsx: Lines 30-31 getRedirectPath returns '/agent/terrain' for user_type='field_agent'
context_for_next_testing_agent: Field agent auth bug fixed and verified. Key test file: /app/backend/tests/test_field_agent_auth.py covers: registration with user_type=field_agent, login by email/phone, /me endpoint ObjectId serialization, RBAC access to /api/agent/search and /api/agent/dashboard/stats. Frontend routing verified: field_agent redirects to /agent/terrain, cooperative redirects to /cooperative/dashboard.

features_verified.POST /api/auth/register (field_agent): PASS - Creates account with user_type=field_agent and roles=['field_agent']
features_verified.POST /api/auth/login (email): PASS - Returns access_token and user with all ObjectId fields serialized to strings
features_verified.POST /api/auth/login (phone): PASS - Also works with phone number
features_verified.GET /api/auth/me (field_agent): PASS - Returns user data without ObjectId serialization errors
features_verified./register page Agent Terrain option: PASS - Shows 'Agent Terrain' with icon and description
features_verified./agent/terrain dashboard: PASS - Loads AgentTerrainDashboard with search functionality

bug_fix_verification.original_issue: User created field agent account but gets 'erreur de connexion au serveur' when trying to login
root_causes_fixed: 1. field_agent was not in registration form user types - FIXED in Register.jsx line 18
2. ObjectId fields not serialized in login/me responses - FIXED in auth.py lines 264-267 and 280-283
3. Login redirect for field_agent went to /profile instead of /agent/terrain - FIXED in Login.jsx lines 30-31
bug_fix_verification.verification_result: All three root causes fixed and verified
